visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in an outdoor urban setting with natural daylight. A middle-aged man (Tim哥) is walking while wearing a checkered flat cap, black-rimmed glasses, and a black button-down shirt. He speaks directly to someone off-camera, gesturing with his hands as he moves along a paved sidewalk with green trees and city structures in the background. (2) The scene transitions to the interior of a brightly lit retail store. Tim哥 is now standing in front of glass display cases filled with electronic product boxes. He holds up a dark-colored iPhone 14 Pro, pointing to its camera module while looking at the camera with an expressive, enthusiastic face. (3) A close-up shot focuses on the iPhone 14 Pro placed on a textured grey work mat. A pair of hands belonging to a staff member enters the frame to inspect the device, turning it over to show the reflective back and the triple-lens camera system. The background is a clean, neutral-toned countertop. (4) The camera shifts to a medium shot of a male staff member wearing glasses and a white branded t-shirt. He stands in front of a shelf stocked with various 3C accessories and mobile phone boxes. He talks and gestures towards the side, explaining the trade-in process. (5) Tim哥 and the staff member are seen together near a tall glass display cabinet. The cabinet contains several iPhones of various colors (blue, black, white, gold) neatly arranged on glass shelves. The store lighting is bright and even, creating reflections on the glass surfaces. (6) A detailed close-up shot of an iPhone 12 Pro inside the cabinet is shown. A white price tag is attached to the shelf below it, displaying technical specs and a price of 9990. The phone's dark blue finish and Apple logo are clearly visible. (7) Tim哥 points towards a different section of the cabinet, where an iPhone 12 Mini in a light cream/gold color is displayed. He leans in closer to the glass to examine the device, his facial expression suggesting surprise and interest. (8) Another close-up shows the iPhone 12 Mini with a price tag of 8900. In the background, cars can be seen driving past the store's glass window, indicating the shop's street-level location. (9) The final phase shows Tim哥 in a close-up, speaking directly into the lens. He uses emphatic hand gestures to conclude his message. The background remains the retail store interior with soft-focus product displays behind him.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Logo]: miko. (2) [Variety]: 最划算的 iPhone?. (3) [Subtitle]: 老闆 聽說你要帶我去買. (4) [Variety]: 無敵划算!. [Subtitle]: 我現在帶妳去!. (5) [Subtitle]: 光說不練 我跟妳講. [Subtitle]: 我拿了我的 iPhone14 pro. (6) [Variety]: 舊機. [Subtitle]: 請他們估價!!. (7) [Subtitle]: 請問一下我這個14 pro 回收價多少錢?. (8) [Variety]: (準備再見!). [Subtitle]: iPhone14 pro. (9) [Slogan]: 電池續航還OK. [Slogan]: 最高可以回收 17000元. [Variety]: *還是要先檢測機況喔!. (10) [Subtitle]: 啊你們只有收iPhone嗎?. (11) [Variety]: 其實我們每個廠牌. [Slogan]: 三星 OPPO 蘋果. [Variety]: 都可以做回收喔!!. (12) [Subtitle]: 剛進來你們有個新的櫃那是什麽東西啊. (13) [Subtitle]: 有喔Tim哥! 我們這邊有最新到的. (14) [Variety]: 二手機展櫃. [Subtitle]: 上面有各式各樣的 蘋果、三星二手機. (15) [Subtitle]: 從機況最好的S級到B級手機 都可以做挑選喔. (16) [Subtitle]: 真的假的! 欸我要去看一下. [Subtitle]: 妳知道嗎? 它這支. (17) [Slogan]: iPhone12 pro. [Slogan]: *128GB. [Slogan]: 只要 9900元耶. [Slogan]: 電池健康度92%/B級. (18) [Subtitle]: 蠻多很划算的耶! 你們可以來這邊看看. (19) [Subtitle]: 甚至導演喜歡的. (20) [Slogan]: iPhone12 mini. [Slogan]: 128GB. [Slogan]: 只要 8900元耶. [Subtitle]: 雖然它的電池健康度只有72%. (21) [Subtitle]: 但是 他們可以直接幫你換. (22) [Variety]: 原廠電池. [Subtitle]: 趕快來買!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim哥), 1 staff member, and occasional blurred passers-by outside.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Tim哥 is a middle-aged male wearing a black button-up shirt and a black-and-white checkered flat cap with glasses. The staff member is a younger male with glasses and a white t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves from an outdoor sidewalk with trees and city buildings into a well-lit 3C retail store (Miko) featuring glass display cabinets, shelves full of product boxes, and visible street traffic through the storefront window.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, upbeat electronic pop track characterized by a strong synth bass and steady percussive beat. Tim哥's voice enters with high arousal and a friendly, excited tone, speaking rapidly. (2) A subtle 'whoosh' sound effect punctuates a visual transition. The BGM remains consistent in the background while Tim哥 continues his fast-paced narration. (3) A sharp 'click' or 'ding' sound effect triggers as text overlays appear on screen. The acoustic texture shifts slightly as the staff member begins speaking; his voice is calmer and more professional, with a lower pitch than Tim哥's. (4) Multiple short 'pop' sound effects occur in sequence, coinciding with the appearance of price tags and variety-show captions. The BGM maintains its tempo, providing a constant energetic pulse. (5) As Tim哥 resumes the lead narration, his pitch variability increases to emphasize the low prices of the used phones. The interplay between his bright vocal quality and the driving electronic music creates a sense of promotional urgency. (6) The video ends with a final emphatic phrase from Tim哥, followed by a quick fade-out of the music track, leaving a brief moment of clean room tone.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a promotional showcase for the 'Miko' retail store, highlighting their mobile phone trade-in services and their inventory of high-quality used iPhones. By featuring a well-known 3C influencer (Tim哥), the content builds trust while providing practical information about recycling prices and refurbished phone deals.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly features the Miko store branding, staff, and services as the central subject of the content.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The fast editing pace and frequent use of pop-up graphics are designed to retain viewer attention in a short-form social media format.
